data.title: Secure Authentication
data.description: Employs OAuth 2.0 and multi-factor authentication to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with Google Account security features.

data.title: Encrypted Data Transmission
data.description: Ensures all data transmitted between users and servers is encrypted using HTTPS.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS protocols for secure connections.

data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: Employs machine learning algorithms to detect and remove inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: Combines automated systems with human reviewers.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements protection measures against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google's global network to absorb and mitigate attacks.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors, detects, and responds to security threats using anomaly detection algorithms.
